function.message: I can’t safely complete the deletion yet because the request is ambiguous in canonical project records. I identified the sci-fi reading lane project (`40_projects/2026_04_03_black_library_evenings/README.MD`), but I could not find a canonical project matching “basement renovation,” so I cannot determine which of the two should be deleted without guessing.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied process-next-inbox-item and deletion-and-wiping workflows: confirm exact canonical target set before destructive action; if evidence is not unique, stop for clarification and do not mutate workspace.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request requires choosing between two projects, but only one is canonically identifiable from project records I read. Since the second project is not uniquely established in canonical project files, deleting any project would require guessing, which is disallowed.
